subtitle: SBOM, open-source notices and security reports for a single project — in one run

form.title: Scan settings
form.description: Enter your project details and pick what to generate.

source.label: Scan target
source.currentDirHint: Scans the source in this folder (mounted as /src). To scan a different folder, run --ui from there.
source.rootfsHint: Scans an OS rootfs or any subfolder under the current folder (/src) as a directory. Paths outside the folder are rejected — place the rootfs under the launch folder, or use a Docker image instead.
source.gitHint: Public repos clone directly; for private repos enter a token below.
source.gitTokenHint: Only for private repos. Used once for the clone; never stored or logged.
source.sbomAnalyzeHint: Notice + security reports are enabled automatically for the risk analysis.
source.firmwareHint: Unpacks, then identifies components with syft + cve-bin-tool (.bin/.img/.squashfs…).
source.firmwareUnavailable: Firmware analysis needs Docker running (the firmware image runs as a sibling container).
source.siblingPullNotice: First run pulls the dedicated image (a large, one-time download); later runs reuse it.
source.dockerHint: Scans a local/remote Docker image (Docker socket required).
source.aiModelHint: Enter a HuggingFace model ID as 'org/model' (e.g. Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B) — not a collection name or a full URL. Fetches model-card metadata over the network to build a CycloneDX ML-BOM.
source.aiModelUnavailable: AI-model SBOMs need Docker running (the AIBOM image runs as a sibling container).

options.aiNoticeHint: For an AI model the notice lists the model and dataset licenses and flags use-restricted ones (RAIL, non-commercial) for review — worth keeping on.
options.deepLicenseHint: Downloads each package's source and scans it for license information, instead of trusting the license the package declares (slow).
options.identifyVendoredHint: Finds third-party open source copied straight into the source tree without a package manager (mainly C/C++). Sends only file fingerprints — never the source — to the OSSKB service.
options.scanossTokenHint: The free OSSKB endpoint is rate-limited and may return nothing. A token from scanoss.com makes identification reliable. Used once for this scan; never stored or logged.
options.includeOsvHint: Adds OSV.dev advisories to the firmware vulnerability match. The OSV database is not bundled in the image, so it downloads from osv.dev on this run (progress is shown below).

progress.title: Run log
progress.waiting: Live logs will appear here once a scan starts.

result.title: Results
result.aiScanBody: Generated from HuggingFace model metadata. It centers on the model and its datasets, so it has fewer components than a typical software scan.
result.vendoredHintTitle: Few components found — is this C/C++ embedded source?
result.vendoredHintBody: Open source is often copied (vendored) into C/C++ sources that have no package manager, where a normal scan can't see it. Turn on "File-level identification (SCANOSS)" under Advanced scan options and run again. Only file fingerprints are sent — your source stays local.
result.scanossUnavailableBody: The OSSKB lookup was blocked (rate limit, no network, or no token). The free OSSKB endpoint is rate-limited for anonymous use — add a SCANOSS token under Advanced scan options and run again to get results.
result.scanossNoMatchBody: SCANOSS searched successfully but found no third-party open source copied directly into the source — either there is none, or the code isn't in OSSKB.
result.vendoredBadgeHint: Identified by SCANOSS as open source copied into the sources

riskReport.title: Open-source risk report
riskReport.desc: Consolidated supply-chain risk analysis across licenses and vulnerabilities.

sbom.title: SBOM (CycloneDX)
sbom.desc: The normalized software bill of materials in CycloneDX JSON.

notice.title: Open-source notice
notice.desc: License notices and attributions for the bundled components.

conformance.title: Conformance report
conformance.desc: Format validation of the submitted SBOM.

security.title: Security report
security.desc: Known vulnerabilities (CVE) found in the components.

signature.title: SBOM signature
signature.desc: Cosign signature for verifying the SBOM.

deps.loadError: Could not load the SBOM for the dependency view.
deps.flatFallback: This SBOM has no dependency graph; showing a flat component list.
deps.tooLarge: The graph has {{count}} nodes (over {{cap}}); use the tree view instead.
deps.graphError: The dependency graph could not be rendered.
deps.arrowHint: Arrows point from a package to what it depends on.
deps.interactHint: Hover to trace a package's links; click for details.

sourceTree.loadError: Could not load the source file tree.
sourceTree.noLicenseHint: License details appear when you run a ScanCode (deep-license) scan.

nav.label: Sections
nav.sectionsHint: Run a scan to see result sections here.

newscan.title: What do you want to scan?
newscan.subtitle: Pick a target and BomLens generates the SBOM, open-source notice, and security report locally in one run.

models.loadError: Could not load the model SBOM.
models.disclosureHint: Whether each axis is documented in the model card — not a claim about the model itself.

g7.subtitle: G7 minimum elements for AI
g7.allAdvisory: All G7 elements are advisory (a non-binding guideline).

g7-model-id.what: Identifies the model with a standard identifier such as PURL/CPE.
g7-model-id.fix: Add a purl or cpe to the model component in the SBOM.

g7-model-license.what: The license that applies to the model.
g7-model-license.fix: State a license on the model card, or fill the licenses field on the SBOM component.

g7-model-card.what: Model-card info such as architecture and training parameters.
g7-model-card.fix: Document architecture and hyperparameters in the HuggingFace model card (README).

g7-model-hash.what: Integrity hashes for the model weight files.
g7-model-hash.fix: Add the model file hashes (e.g. SHA-256) to the component's hashes in the SBOM.

g7-datasets.what: Provenance of the datasets used for training.
g7-datasets.fix: Reference the training datasets as data components in the SBOM.

g7-openness.what: How open the weights, architecture, data and training are.
g7-openness.fix: Declare the model's openness (public weights/data/training code) in the SBOM or model card.

licenses.clickHint: Click a license to see its components

recent.title: Recent scans
recent.subtitle: Past scans saved in this machine's local output folder · no account, no server.
recent.empty: No scans yet. Start with a New scan.
recent.source: Delete a file and it leaves this list too.

validation.required: Enter a project name and version (and any required input).
